description: Measures x-op debate strategy consistency across 3 independent trials on a technical architecture decision.

method.topic: x-kit should adopt Claude Code native Agent Teams (TeamCreate/SendMessage) instead of the current Agent tool hub-and-spoke pattern

results.key_factor: strategy_redesign cited as decisive factor in 3/3 trials

conclusions: Judge verdict is perfectly consistent (CON 3/3) — debate strategy produces deterministic decisions
Argument surface shows controlled variance — core arguments stable, supporting arguments vary
debate strategy is well-calibrated: stable conclusions with diverse evidence exploration
